response.step_by_step_log: 1. Watched the entire video to analyze visual and audio content. 2. Audio contains only in-game ambient sounds, sound effects (like block breaking), and conversations between the players. 3. No vocal musical performances or songs with lyrics were detected. 4. Divided the video into scenes based on the flow of gameplay interactions and topics of conversation. 5. Set contains_vocal_music to false for all scenes and populated corresponding fields with null.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a conversation between players within a Minecraft-like game environment, focusing on trading items, discussing gambling, and farming. No vocal musical performances were detected.

scenes.description: Initial interaction between players, including discussion about ramen and trading fireworks/rockets.
Conversation regarding gambling experiences in the game and the outcome of betting.
Moving to the farm area and planning for future harvests and financial goals.
Farming session, cutting melons, continued casual conversation about in-game activities and real-life snacks.
